overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City at dusk. The player moves along a sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers illuminated with neon advertisements. The scene transitions from street-level observation to gazing up at massive overhead infrastructure before continuing through a busier commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highway

events.description: futuristic black sedan passes by on the right side of the road
green sports car drives past on the right side of the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, observing the passing traffic and neon signs on surrounding buildings

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving past on the multi-lane road
green sports car speeding by on the right

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel highway structure spanning overhead with support pillars
tall building facade covered with large illuminated digital advertisements displaying various content
tall modern building with reflective glass facade and purple neon accent lighting
metal barrier with vertical posts separating the sidewalk from the street
tall palm tree lining the street in front of the commercial buildings

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a first-person view walking beneath a massive elevated highway overpass in a futuristic city. Digital billboards illuminate the left side while glass towers rise on the right. The camera moves steadily forward along a concrete sidewalk separated from the road by a metal guardrail, as futuristic vehicles pass by on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: open sidewalk approaching intersection with large vertical advertising displays

events.description: camera turns sharply to the right to focus on a large vertical billboard
camera tilts upward to view the elevated highway structure and towering skyscrapers above

agents.ego_description: pausing forward movement to examine a large advertisement billboard, then gazing upward at the massive architectural structures overhead

entered.detail: illuminated vertical advertisement board displaying 'Good Morning to Night City in 2077' with a portrait and text
extremely tall futuristic skyscraper with illuminated windows rising high into the dusky sky

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right to focus on a prominent vertical billboard advertising Night City, then tilts upward to reveal the massive scale of the elevated highway infrastructure and towering skyscrapers above. The perspective emphasizes the verticality of the futuristic architecture against the dusky sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway passing under massive infrastructure with transit shelter

events.description: camera tilts back down from looking up at the sky to resume forward walking
passing a covered bus stop shelter on the left side of the walkway

agents.ego_description: examining the massive architectural structures overhead before continuing forward past a transit shelter

notable_agents.action: distant figure walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: covered transit waiting area with glass panels, illuminated seating, and futuristic design
cluster of modern glass office towers with grid-patterned illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: The camera tilts down from the sky and continues forward, passing beneath the massive concrete pillars of the elevated highway. A modern bus stop shelter with illuminated elements comes into view on the left, while the mega-skyscraper remains visible in the distance ahead. The environment feels enclosed by the overhead infrastructure.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown commercial sidewalk with advertising kiosks and pedestrian traffic

events.description: flying vehicle passes overhead in the distance between the skyscrapers
pedestrian density increases as the camera approaches a busy intersection area

agents.ego_description: walking briskly along the sidewalk past illuminated advertising kiosks and other pedestrians, approaching a busier intersection

notable_agents.action: person in casual clothing walking in the opposite direction on the sidewalk
flying car passing overhead between the tall buildings in the distance

entered.detail: standalone illuminated advertisement display with bright yellow frame and digital screen showing a portrait
futuristic public seating with glowing blue accent lighting along the walkway
building facade covered in bright pink and blue neon signs and large digital displays

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows continued movement through a busier commercial district, passing illuminated advertising kiosks and futuristic benches. The elevated highway recedes into the background left as the camera approaches a more open intersection. Flying vehicles pass overhead between the glass towers, and more pedestrians populate the sidewalk, creating a lively urban atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the oppressive shadow of a massive highway overpass into the vibrant openness of a bustling commercial district. It begins with a steady walk along a concrete sidewalk beneath the overpass, where digital billboards and glass towers frame the path as futuristic vehicles stream past. The camera then pivots right to focus on a vertical Night City advertisement before tilting sharply upward to emphasize the staggering scale of the overhead infrastructure and skyscrapers against the dusky sky. As the perspective tilts back down, the movement continues beneath heavy concrete pillars and past an illuminated bus stop, maintaining a sense of enclosure. Finally, the scene expands as the highway recedes into the background, opening into a lively intersection filled with pedestrians, advertising kiosks, and flying vehicles weaving between the towering glass spires.
